results.description: Link to sign up to their managed agents platform · This is really helpful for those large system's that need the long memory to ensure that you do not have to "reteach" the AI from a base memory or md file

results.title: Agents need control flow, not more prompts | Hacker News
results.description: We've got a QA agent that needs to run through, say, 200 markdown files of requirements in a browser session.
